allow: Bash(node -e "const { Server } = require\('@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server'\); console.log\('Server:', typeof Server\); const { StdioServerTransport } = require\('@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio'\); console.log\('Transport:', typeof StdioServerTransport\); const { ListToolsRequestSchema, CallToolRequestSchema } = require\('@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/types'\); console.log\('Schemas:', typeof ListToolsRequestSchema, typeof CallToolRequestSchema\);")
